# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

# kong.conf — production-oriented baseline

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Logging
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
log_level = notice

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Database (choose ONE strategy: postgres/cassandra/off)
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
database = postgres

pg_host = 127.0.0.1
pg_port = 5432
pg_user = kong
pg_password = CHANGEME_STRONG_PASSWORD
pg_database = kong
pg_ssl = on
pg_ssl_verify = on
pg_timeout = 5000

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Proxy (client traffic)
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000 reuseport backlog=16384
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8443 http2 ssl reuseport backlog=16384

# Path to certificate and key to serve proxy HTTPS.
# If terminating TLS elsewhere (LB/Ingress), you may omit these.
ssl_cert = /etc/kong/ssl/proxy.crt
ssl_cert_key = /etc/kong/ssl/proxy.key

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Admin API (restrict access)
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Bind Admin API to localhost (recommended). Expose via SSH tunnel or internal network only.
admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8001 reuseport backlog=1024
admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8444 http2 ssl reuseport backlog=1024

admin_ssl_cert = /etc/kong/ssl/admin.crt
admin_ssl_cert_key = /etc/kong/ssl/admin.key

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Security hardening
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
admin_gui_access_log = /dev/stdout
admin_gui_error_log = /dev/stderr
admin_access_log = /dev/stdout
admin_error_log = /dev/stderr
proxy_access_log = /dev/stdout
proxy_error_log = /dev/stderr

# If using RBAC / enterprise features, configure accordingly (not included here).

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Performance / Nginx tuning
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
nginx_worker_processes = auto
nginx_daemon = off

nginx_http_client_body_buffer_size = 16k
nginx_http_client_max_body_size = 0
nginx_http_keepalive_requests = 10000
nginx_http_keepalive_timeout = 60s
nginx_http_lingering_close = on

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# DNS / Networking
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
dns_resolver = 8.8.8.8,8.8.4.4
dns_order = LAST,A,CNAME,AAAA,SRV
dns_valid_ttl = 30
dns_stale_ttl = 3600

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Plugins
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
plugins = bundled

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Misc
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
anonymous_reports = off
